8 top things to know·Featured in 8 Special Hotel Buffets Perfect For Every Occasion+7 more

Featured in 8 Special Hotel Buffets Perfect For Every Occasion
Visit site
Featured in Top 20 Luxury Hotels near Manila Bay, Manila
Visit site
4 min drive to the Rizal Monument
Guests praised the service
Diamond Hotel Manila has that old-school charm, that’s really the best way to describe it. From the moment we arrived, the service was great. The staff were friendly, attentive, and made us feel welcome, and both the check-in and check-out process were absolutely flawless. We booked a corner room with a city view, and I really liked it. The room was nicely curated and well-presented, it felt comfortable and thoughtfully put together. The breakfast buffet was honestly a bit “meh” for the price. I expected more options and better quality, especially for a five-star hotel, so it felt a little underwhelming. We also ordered dinner through in-room dining. The food could’ve been warmer, and the presentation could definitely be better. Serving it on a trolley would’ve made it feel more like a proper five-star experience. All in all, great service and classic charm, but there’s still room for improvement, most especially when it comes to the food.

    • Frequently asked questions about Diamond Hotel Philippines

    What are the check-in and check-out times for Diamond Hotel Philippines?
    Diamond Hotel Philippines has a check-in time of 2:00 PM and a check-out time of 12:00 PM
    What are the main amenities at Diamond Hotel Philippines?
    Diamond Hotel Philippines's most popular amenities include:
    • Pool
    • Spa
    • Parkingfree
    • Breakfastfree
    Does Diamond Hotel Philippines offer free Wi-Fi?
    Yes, Diamond Hotel Philippines offers free Wi-Fi
    Does Diamond Hotel Philippines have a pool?
    Yes, Diamond Hotel Philippines has an outdoor pool
    Is parking available at Diamond Hotel Philippines, and is it free?
    Yes, Diamond Hotel Philippines has free self-parking available, and valet parking available for an additional fee
    How long does it take to get from Diamond Hotel Philippines to Rizal Park?
    Taking public transit from Diamond Hotel Philippines to Rizal Park takes approximately 23 min
    How long does it take to get from Diamond Hotel Philippines to Ninoy Aquino International Airport?
    Approximate travel times to get from Diamond Hotel Philippines to Ninoy Aquino International Airport:
    • By car: 22 min
    • By public transit: 1 hr 27 min
    What is the official star rating of Diamond Hotel Philippines?
    Diamond Hotel Philippines is a 5-star hotel

    CJ Corciga4 months ago on Google
    5/5
    Vacation ❘ Couple
    Diamond Hotel Manila has that old-school charm, that’s really the best way to describe it. From the moment we arrived, the service was great. The staff were friendly, attentive, and made us feel welcome, and both the check-in and check-out … Read more
    Diamond Hotel Manila has that old-school charm, that’s really the best way to describe it. From the moment we arrived, the service was great. The staff were friendly, attentive, and made us feel welcome, and both the check-in and check-out process were absolutely flawless.
    We booked a corner room with a city view, and I really liked it. The room was nicely curated and well-presented, it felt comfortable and thoughtfully put together.
    The breakfast buffet was honestly a bit “meh” for the price. I expected more options and better quality, especially for a five-star hotel, so it felt a little underwhelming.
    We also ordered dinner through in-room dining. The food could’ve been warmer, and the presentation could definitely be better. Serving it on a trolley would’ve made it feel more like a proper five-star experience.
    All in all, great service and classic charm, but there’s still room for improvement, most especially when it comes to the food.
    Rooms5.0
    Service4.0
    Location4.0

    We appreciate your comments about the breakfast buffet and in-room dining, and we will share these with our culinary team for improvement.

    Thank you for staying with us, and we hope to welcome you back for a better experience in the future.

    Sincerely yours,

    Cecil Bernabe-Abundo

    Front Office Manager

    Edwin Labja4 months ago on Google
    5/5
    Vacation ❘ Family
    Spending Christmas at Diamond Hotel Philippines is like stepping into a festive time machine—one lined with marble floors, gilded accents, and that unmistakable old-school Manila elegance that never goes out of style. 🎁💎 From the twinkling … Read more
    Spending Christmas at Diamond Hotel Philippines is like stepping into a festive time machine—one lined with marble floors, gilded accents, and that unmistakable old-school Manila elegance that never goes out of style. 🎁💎 From the twinkling lobby lights to the warm smiles at every turn, this five-star gem wrapped our holiday in luxury and nostalgia.
    The service? Impeccable. Truly a masterclass in Filipino hospitality. And a special salute to the incredible staff working on Christmas Day—still cheerful, attentive, and full of holiday spirit even as the rest of us were debating a third plate of ham. 🎅🏼👏 If there’s any justice in the world, they all went home with extra pay and a box of fruitcake.
    We were treated to a Christmas buffet held in the grand ballroom, and yes—it was every bit as opulent as it sounds. Picture: endless spreads of holiday favorites, carving stations slicing through juicy roasts like butter, a dessert table so gorgeous it deserved a moment of silence, and soft music that made you feel like you were dining in an old holiday movie. 🍽️🎶🍰 The ambiance was peak Noche Buena meets five-star hotel banquet—festive, refined, and just a little extra (as it should be).
    Every corner of the hotel radiated polished charm—from the glittering chandeliers to the sweeping staircase just begging for a dramatic holiday entrance. Think: classic Manila prestige with a ribbon of Christmas magic wrapped around it. 🎀✨
    If you’re dreaming of a holiday where luxury meets heartfelt service, Diamond Hotel absolutely delivers. It’s not just a stay—it’s a celebration, lovingly crafted and flawlessly executed. Here’s to timeless glamour, warm hospitality, and staff who make the season bright (even if they’re secretly running on coffee and Christmas miracles). 🌟🍾💖

    About this hotel

    An 11-minute walk from the Embassy of the United States, this upscale tower-style hotel is 12 minutes on foot from the gardens at Rizal Park.…

    Elegant rooms with warm palettes feature free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs, plus minibars and sitting areas. Upgraded rooms on a private floor include free breakfast and butler service, and suites have separate living rooms, panoramic views and/or whirlpool tubs. Kids age 12 and under stay free with an adult.

    The hotel has 6 restaurant/bars, including a Japanese eatery and a lounge with live music. There's also a wellness area with a pool and an outdoor hot tub, plus spa treatments and a fitness room.

    Check-in time: 2:00 PM
    Check-out time: 12:00 PM

    Health & safety

    Enhanced cleaning

    • Enhanced cleaning of guest rooms
    • Commercial-grade disinfectant used to clean the property
    • Employees trained in COVID-19 cleaning procedures
    • Employees wear masks, face shields, and/or gloves
    • Enhanced cleaning of common areas
    • Employees trained in thorough hand-washing

    Personal protection

    • Masks required on the property
    • Hand-sanitizer and/or sanitizing wipes in common areas
    • In-room hygiene kits with masks, hand sanitizer, and/or antibacterial wipes
    • Masks and/or gloves available for guests

    Physical distancing

    • Guest occupancy limited within shared facilities
    • Physical distancing required
    • Common areas arranged to maintain physical distancing
    • Safety dividers at front desk and other locations
    • Private spaces designated in spa and wellness areas

    Minimized contact

    • No-contact check-in and check-out
    • High-touch items, such as decorative pillows, removed from guest rooms
    • Plastic key cards are disinfected or discarded
    • High-touch items, such as magazines, removed from common areas
    • Buffer maintained between room bookings
    • Housekeeping scheduled by request only

    Increased food safety

    • Additional sanitation in dining areas
    • Additional safety measures during food prep and serving
    • Disposable flatware
    • Individually-packaged meals
    • Single-use menus
    Health & safety measures are provided by the hotel. Contact the hotel for more details.
